title: Add User model with password hash field
description: Create a User domain model in src/models/user-model.ts with fields: id (UUID), email (unique, indexed), passwordHash, createdAt, updatedAt. Password hashing must use bcrypt with cost factor >= 12. No role/permission fields per acceptance criteria.
existing_patterns: src/models/notification.ts - domain model in kebab-case with TypeScript interface
src/auth/auth-service.ts:45-60 - password verification using crypto pbkdf2 (reference for password handling patterns)
src/auth/user-store.ts:53-58 - hashPassword using crypto.subtle (existing hashing pattern)
